name: Pasta and Peppers with Fennel
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces mostaccioli (2-1/2 cups), uncooked, tube shaped macaroni
1 medium red bell pepper, cut into thin strips
1 medium yellow bell pepper, cut into thin strips
1 medium green bell pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook mostaccioli to desired doneness as directed on the package. Drain and rinse with hot water.
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add bell peppers and onions; cook and stir for 2 to 5 minutes, or until crisp-tender.
3. Add mostaccioli, fennel, salt, and pepper; blend well. Cook an additional 3 to 5 minutes, or until mixture is thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally.
